text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Today brings me to the Arima Kinen and the final
showdown against the Golden Generation.
Donning the aura of a ruler, I take the stage.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
All are left nearly speechless in awe of my spirit.
They manage only to utter, "She is the mighty
king."

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Today might just become Coronation Day of the
Centurial Overlord.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: Now, ladies and gentlemen! This is the finale to Origins of the Centurial Overlord!
